# Brian

> Brian is a company brain for governed AI-agent execution. It turns a company's procedures, hard rules, guardrails, and escalation paths into reviewed skills that agents can follow.

Brian is designed for teams delegating real operational work to AI agents. Unlike generic agent memory or chat-with-your-docs products, Brian focuses on safe action: it retrieves the right procedure, enforces non-negotiable rules, stops when a guardrail is reached, escalates to a human, and logs the outcome.

## Core product concepts

- Company brain: shared operational judgment available to every connected AI agent.
- Skills: versioned, executable procedures with triggers, inputs, hard rules, guardrails, tools, examples, owners, and escalation targets.
- Safe delegation: agents act within approved limits and stop when a human decision is required.
- Review and audit: risky knowledge stays in draft for human approval; executions and overrides are logged.
- Open integration: Brian uses MCP and works with compatible agent clients and custom agents.
